system.notes:
U.S. armed-forces powered armor (game rules in Maximum Metal; stats printed in Home of the Brave).

Manufacturer: Militech/GE. Chassis: Gunslinger, STR 25. Chassis weight: 138 kg. Capacity/carry: 1250 kg / 375 kg. Reflexes: Low-Boost Reflexes. SIB/DFB: 0/+2. Punch 3D10, Kick 5D10, Crush 4D10. Toughness mod: -7. Trooper size: 115 kg. Total weight: 885 kg. Total cost: 139,400 eb.

Per-limb armor: all locations SP 40. Main/loadout: 25mm autocannon (PA monosword; 7.62mm LMG; 40mm auto grenade launcher; Dragon flamer).

The per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout are printed as an interleaved grid; only cleanly readable cells are transcribed here. See Home of the Brave p.90 image for the complete grid.

needsEyes: Per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout: printed grid is column-interleaved in the text layer; not transcribed. Read from Home of the Brave p.90 image.
